/* Auth controlado por JS */ /* ── MAIS (configurações premium) ─────────────────────── */ .mais-hd{ padding:calc(var(--safe-top,0px)+16px) 20px 0; display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between; flex-shrink:0; } .mais-hd-title{ font-size:28px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;letter-spacing:-.6px; } .mais-scroll{ flex:1;overflow-y:auto;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch; padding:20px 16px 0; } /* Card de perfil */ .mais-profile-card{ display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px; padding:16px 18px; background:rgba(124,92,252,.1); border:1.5px solid rgba(124,92,252,.22); border-radius:20px; cursor:pointer; transition:all .18s; -webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent; margin-bottom:28px; } .mais-profile-card:active{opacity:.8;transform:scale(.985);} .mais-av-circle{ width:56px;height:56px;border-radius:50%; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7C5CFC,#a78bfa); display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center; font-size:22px;font-weight:800;color:#fff; flex-shrink:0;letter-spacing:0; } .mais-profile-info{flex:1;min-width:0;} .mais-profile-name{font-size:17px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;} .mais-profile-email{font-size:12px;color:var(--t2);margin-top:3px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;} .mais-profile-chevron{flex-shrink:0;} /* ── Chips de parcelamento ── */ .parc-chip{padding:10px 4px;border-radius:10px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:transparent;color:var(--t2);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:all .15s} .parc-chip:active{transform:scale(.95)} .parc-chip-active,.parc-chip.active{border-color:#7C5CFC!important;background:rgba(124,92,252,.15)!important;color:#a78bfa!important} /* ── Botões de frequência ── */ .freq-btn{padding:10px 4px;border-radius:10px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:transparent;color:var(--t2);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:all .15s} .freq-btn:active{transform:scale(.95)} .freq-active,.freq-btn.active{border-color:#7C5CFC!important;background:rgba(124,92,252,.15)!important;color:#a78bfa!important} /* ── Chips de duração ── */ .dur-btn{padding:10px 4px;border-radius:10px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:transparent;color:var(--t2);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:all .15s} .dur-btn:active{transform:scale(.95)} .dur-active,.dur-btn.active{border-color:#10b981!important;background:rgba(16,185,129,.12)!important;color:#34d399!important} /* QuickReg parc chips */ .qr-parc-chip{padding:9px 4px;border-radius:9px;border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);background:transparent;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:all .15s} .qr-parc-chip:active{transform:scale(.95)} .qr-parc-active,.qr-parc-chip.active{border-color:#7C5CFC!important;background:rgba(124,92,252,.2)!important;color:#a78bfa!important} .qr-dur-btn{padding:9px 4px;border-radius:9px;border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);background:transparent;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:all .15s} .qr-dur-active,.qr-dur-btn.active{border-color:#10b981!important;background:rgba(16,185,129,.15)!important;color:#34d399!important} /* ── Chips de filtro da tela de Transações ── */ .tx-fchip{flex-shrink:0;padding:8px 14px;border-radius:20px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:var(--card2);color:var(--t2);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;white-space:nowrap;transition:all .15s} .tx-fchip:active{transform:scale(.95)} .tx-fchip-active,.tx-fchip.active{background:rgba(124,92,252,.15);border-color:#7C5CFC;color:#a78bfa} /* Seção label */ .mais-section-label{ font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.8px; color:var(--t3);text-transform:uppercase; padding:0 4px;margin-bottom:8px; } /* Grupo de rows */ .mais-group{ background:rgba(255,255,255,.04); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07); border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden; margin-bottom:28px; } /* Row individual */ .mais-row{ display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px; padding:14px 16px; cursor:pointer; transition:background .15s; -webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent; } .mais-row:active{background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);} .mais-row-border{border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);} .mais-row-ic{ width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:11px; display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center; flex-shrink:0; } .mais-row-body{flex:1;min-width:0;} .mais-row-title{font-size:15px;font-weight:600;color:#fff;} .mais-row-sub{font-size:12px;color:var(--t3);margin-top:2px;} /* Toggle tema */ .mais-toggle-wrap{flex-shrink:0;} .mais-toggle-track{ width:46px;height:26px;border-radius:13px; background:rgba(255,255,255,.12); border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1); position:relative; transition:background .25s,border-color .25s; cursor:pointer; } .mais-toggle-thumb{ position:absolute;top:3px;left:3px; width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%; background:rgba(255,255,255,.5); transition:transform .25s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1),background .25s; box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.3); } .mais-toggle.on .mais-toggle-track{ background:rgba(167,139,250,.35); border-color:rgba(167,139,250,.5); } .mais-toggle.on .mais-toggle-thumb{ transform:translateX(20px); background:#a78bfa; } /* Zona de perigo */ .mais-danger-zone{ display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center; gap:10px;margin-bottom:0; } .mais-danger-label{ font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.8px; color:rgba(248,113,113,.4);text-transform:uppercase; padding:0 4px;margin-bottom:0;align-self:flex-start; } .mais-danger-btn{ width:100%;padding:14px 18px; border-radius:16px; background:rgba(248,113,113,.06); border:1px solid rgba(248,113,113,.18); color:#f87171; font-size:14px;font-weight:600; display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px; cursor:pointer; transition:all .18s; -webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent; font-family:inherit; } .mais-danger-btn:active{background:rgba(248,113,113,.12);transform:scale(.985);} /* Modal de confirmação */ .mais-modal-bg{ position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:800; display:none;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:center; background:rgba(0,0,0,.6); backdrop-filter:blur(6px); -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(6px); padding-bottom:env(safe-area-inset-bottom,0px); } .mais-modal-bg.open{display:flex;} .mais-modal{ background:#1a1c2a; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1); border-radius:24px 24px 0 0; padding:28px 24px 32px; width:100%;max-width:520px; animation:slideUpModal .3s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1); } @keyframes slideUpModal{ from{transform:translateY(100%);opacity:0;} to{transform:translateY(0);opacity:1;} } .mais-modal-icon{ width:56px;height:56px;border-radius:16px; background:rgba(248,113,113,.1);border:1px solid rgba(248,113,113,.2); display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center; margin:0 auto 16px; } .mais-modal-title{ font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:#fff; text-align:center;margin-bottom:10px;letter-spacing:-.4px; } .mais-modal-msg{ font-size:14px;color:var(--t2); text-align:center;line-height:1.55;margin-bottom:24px; } .mais-modal-msg strong{color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);} .mais-modal-btns{display:flex;gap:10px;} .mais-modal-cancel{ flex:1;padding:15px;border-radius:14px; background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);border:none; color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);font-size:15px;font-weight:600; cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:all .15s; } .mais-modal-cancel:active{background:rgba(255,255,255,.12);} .mais-modal-confirm{ flex:1;padding:15px;border-radius:14px; background:rgba(248,113,113,.12); border:1.5px solid rgba(248,113,113,.3); color:#f87171;font-size:15px;font-weight:700; cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:all .15s; } .mais-modal-confirm:active{background:rgba(248,113,113,.22);} /* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ ORGANIZZA — LIGHT MODE COMPLETO Paleta própria, contraste certificado, premium ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */ /* ── 1. VARIÁVEIS FUNDACIONAIS ────────────────────────────── Substituem os valores dark. Tudo que usa var() adapta automaticamente sem override extra. ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ body.light-theme { /* Fundo */ --bg: #F4F5FA; --bg2: #FFFFFF; /* Cards */ --card: #FFFFFF; --card2: #EDF0F7; --card3: #E2E5F0; /* Bordas */ --border: #DDE1EE; --border2: #C8CCDA; /* Textos */ --text: #0C0D14; --t1: #0C0D14; --t2: #474B5E; --t3: #696E82; /* Sombras */ --shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.05), 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.06); --shadow-lg: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.09), 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.05); /* Brand: purple mantido */ --green: #7C5CFC; --green2: #6D4FE8; --gg: rgba(124,92,252,.1); --gg2: rgba(124,92,252,.05); /* Semânticas */ --red: #DC2626; --rg: rgba(220,38,38,.09); --yellow: #B45309; --yg: rgba(180,83,9,.09); --blue: #0369A1; --bg-blue: rgba(3,105,161,.09); --bg-purple: rgba(124,92,252,.09); /* Glass */ --glass: rgba(255,255,255,.92); --glass-border: rgba(124,92,252,.18); /* Glow menos intenso em fundo claro */ --purple-glow: rgba(124,92,252,.18); } /* ── 2. BASE ──────────────────────────────────────────────── body, scrollbars ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ body.light-theme { background: var(--bg); color: var(--text); } body.light-theme .page { background: var(--bg); } body.light-theme .topbar { background: var(--bg); } body.light-theme ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: rgba(0,0,0,.12); } /* ── 3. NAVBAR ────────────────────────────────────────────── Fundo branco + ícones escuros via currentColor ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ body.light-theme .prem-nav { background: rgba(255,255,255,.97); border-top: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.08); box-shadow: 0 -1px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.06); } /* Ícones inativos: cinza médio */ body.light-theme .pnav-item svg:not(.pnav-fab > svg) { color: #8C91A8 !important; stroke: #8C91A8 !important; filter: none !important; } body.light-theme .pnav-item span { color: #8C91A8; } /* Ativo: purple mantido */ body.light-theme .pnav-item.active svg:not(.pnav-fab > svg) { color: var(--purple) !important; stroke: var(--purple) !important; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 5px rgba(124,92,252,.3)) !important; } body.light-theme .pnav-item.active span { color: var(--purple) !important; } /* ── 4. TOPBAR / HEADER ───────────────────────────────────── Textos que usavam cor branca no título ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ body.light-theme .prem-header-title { color: var(--text); } body.light-theme .prem-header-sub { color: var(--t2); } /* ── 5. HERO CARD (saldo principal) ───────────────────────── Gradiente escuro → gradiente purple vibrante ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ body.light-theme .hero-card { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7C5CFC 0%, #5B3FD8 55%, #4530C0 100%); border: none; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(124,92,252,.35); } /* Hero card: fundo roxo em ambos temas → textos sempre claros */ body.light-theme .hero-label { color: rgba(255,255,255,.82) !important; } body.light-theme .hero-month-btn { color: rgba(255,255,255,.92) !important; } body.light-theme .hero-value { color: #FFFFFF !important; } body.light-theme .hero-change { color: rgba(255,255,255,.95) !important; } body.light-theme .hero-card .icon, body.light-theme .hero-card svg { color: rgba(255,255,255,.9) !important; stroke: rgba(255,255,255,.9) !important; } /* Textos do hero card (ficam sobre roxo — mantêm brancos) */ body.light-theme .hero-card * { } /* ── 6. SCARD (resumo financeiro aba home) ────────────────── Gradiente preto → card branco com borda e sombra ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ body.light-theme .scard { background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); box-shadow: var(--shadow); } body.light-theme .scard * { color: var(--text); } body.light-theme .scard .txa { color: var(--text); } /* ── 7. TRANSAÇÕES ────────────────────────────────────────── items, valores, meta, hover ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ body.light-theme .txi:active, body.light-theme .txi:hover { background: rgba(0,0,0,.025); } /* Separador entre transações */ body.light-theme .txi + .txi::before { background: var(--border); } /* Textos de nome e meta */ body.light-theme .txn { color: var(--text); } body.light-theme .txm { color: var(--t2); } /* ── 8. SEÇÕES / HEADERS ──────────────────────────────────── Títulos e subtítulos de seções ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ body.light-theme .phead h2 { color: var(--text); } body.light-theme .phead p { color: var(--t2); } /* ── 9. ENV BAR (Pessoal/Compartilhado/Empresa) ───────────── ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ body.light-theme .env-bar { background: var(--bg); } body.light-theme .env-pill { background: var(--card); border-color: var(--border); box-shadow: var(--shadow); } body.light-theme .env-pill span { color: var(--t2); } body.light-theme .env-pill svg { color: var(--t2); stroke: var(--t2); } body.light-theme .env-pill.active span { color: var(--purple); } body.light-theme .env-pill.active svg { color: var(--purple); stroke: var(--purple); } /* ── 10. CARDS GENÉRICOS ──────────────────────────────────── mcard (metas), dcard (dívidas), nitem (notificações) ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ body.light-theme .mcard, body.light-theme .dcard, body.light-theme .isumm { box-shadow: var(--shadow); } body.light-theme .nitem { background: var(--card); border-color: var(--border); box-shadow: var(--shadow); } body.light-theme .nitem-tl { color: var(--text); } body.light-theme .nitem-ms { color: var(--t2); } body.light-theme .nitem-dt { color: var(--t3); } body.light-theme .nitem-rd { color: var(--t3); } /* ── 11. CARTÕES (cc-*) ────────────────────────────────────── Todo o módulo de cartões de crédito ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ body.light-theme .cc-page-filter-btn { background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text); box-shadow: var(--shadow); } body.light-theme .cc-summary-card { background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); box-shadow: var(--shadow); } body.light-theme .cc-sum-title { color: var(--text); } body.light-theme .cc-sum-ts, body.light-theme .cc-sum-lbl, body.light-theme .cc-sum-sub { color: var(--t3); } body.light-theme .cc-sum-val { color: var(--text); } body.light-theme .cc-sum-red-txt { color: var(--red) !important; } body.light-theme .cc-sum-lime-txt { color: #16a34a !important; } body.light-theme .cc-sum-item { background: var(--card2); border: 1px solid var(--border); } body.light-theme .cc-filter-tabs { background: var(--card2); border: 1px solid var(--border); } body.light-theme .cc-ftab { color: var(--t2); background: transparent; } body.light-theme .cc-ftab.active { background: var(--purple); color: #fff; } body.light-theme .cc-card-item { background: var(--card); border: 1.5px solid var(--border); box-shadow: var(--shadow); } body.light-theme .cc-card-item:active { box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.1); border-color: rgba(124,92,252,.35); } body.light-theme .cc-card-name { color: var(--text); } body.light-theme .cc-card-last4 { color: var(--t3); } body.light-theme .cc-card-menu-btn { background: var(--card2); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--t2); } body.light-theme .cc-card-limits { background: var(--card2); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 12px; } body.light-theme .cc-card-limit-col { border-right-color: var(--border); } body.light-theme .cc-card-limit-lbl, body.light-theme .cc-card-fatura-vence, body.light-theme .cc-card-bar-row, body.light-theme .cc-card-best { color: var(--t3); } body.light-theme .cc-card-limit-val, body.light-theme .cc-card-fatura-val { color: var(--text); } body.light-theme .cc-card-fatura-col { border-top-color: var(--border); } body.light-theme .cc-act-btn { background: var(--card2); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text); } body.light-theme .cc-act-btn:active { background: var(--card3); } body.light-theme .cc-skeleton { background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--card2) 25%, var(--card3) 50%, var(--card2) 75%); background-size: 200% 100%; } /* ── 12. FILTRO / TABS ────────────────────────────────────── ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ body.light-theme .ctabs { background: var(--card2); border-color: var(--border); } body.light-theme .ctab { color: var(--t2); } body.light-theme .ctab.active { background: var(--card); color: var(--text); box-shadow: var(--shadow); } body.light-theme .rtabs { background: var(--card2); } /* ── 13. BOTÕES ───────────────────────────────────────────── ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ body.light-theme .addbtn, body.light-theme .btn-g { color: #fff; } body.light-theme .btn-sec { background: var(--card); border-color: var(--border); color: var(--text); } /* ── 14. CATEGORIAS / SGCARD ──────────────────────────────── ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ body.light-theme .sgcard { background: var(--card); border-color: var(--border); box-shadow: var(--shadow); } body.light-theme .sgbtn { background: var(--card2); color: var(--t2); border: 1px solid var(--border); } body.light-theme .sgbtn.p { background: var(--purple); color: #fff; border-color: transparent; } /* ── 15. CATEGORIAS / GRUPO DETAIL (DnD) ──────────────────── ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ body.light-theme .mais-hd-title, body.light-theme [id^="dnd-wrap"] .mais-row-title { color: var(--text); } /* Rows de categoria no modo organizar */ body.light-theme [style*="border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07)"] { border-color: var(--border) !important; background: var(--card) !important; } /* ── 16. ABA MAIS (configurações) ─────────────────────────── ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ body.light-theme .mais-hd-title { color: var(--text); } body.light-theme .mais-scroll { background: var(--bg); } body.light-theme .mais-profile-card { background: rgba(124,92,252,.08); border-color: rgba(124,92,252,.2); } body.light-theme .mais-profile-name { color: var(--text); } body.light-theme .mais-profile-email { color: var(--t3); } body.light-theme .mais-section-label { color: var(--t3); } body.light-theme .mais-group { background: var(--card); border-color: var(--border); box-shadow: var(--shadow); } body.light-theme .mais-row:active { background: var(--card2); } body.light-theme .mais-row-border { border-top-color: var(--border); } body.light-theme .mais-row-title { color: var(--text); } body.light-theme .mais-row-sub { color: var(--t2); } body.light-theme .mais-toggle-track { background: var(--card2); border-color: var(--border2); } body.light-theme .mais-toggle-thumb { background: var(--t3); } body.light-theme .mais-toggle.on .mais-toggle-track { background: rgba(124,92,252,.2); border-color: rgba(124,92,252,.35); } body.light-theme .mais-toggle.on .mais-toggle-thumb { background: var(--purple); } body.light-theme .mais-modal { background: var(--card); border-color: var(--border); box-shadow: 0 -4px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.1); } body.light-theme .mais-modal-title { color: var(--text); } body.light-theme .mais-modal-msg { color: var(--t2); } body.light-theme .mais-modal-msg strong { color: var(--text); } body.light-theme .mais-modal-cancel { background: var(--card2); color: var(--t2); border: 1px solid var(--border); } body.light-theme .mais-danger-zone .mais-danger-label { color: rgba(220,38,38,.5); } /* ── 17. OVERLAYS / BOTTOM SHEETS ─────────────────────────── Painéis deslizantes que sobem do rodapé ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ /* Os painéis internos usam var(--card) → adaptação automática via variáveis */ /* Garantir que títulos e labels nos overlays sejam legíveis */ body.light-theme .ov-title, body.light-theme .ovh, body.light-theme .ov-lbl, body.light-theme .sec-lbl, body.light-theme .fl { color: var(--text); } body.light-theme .ov-sub { color: var(--t2); } /* Labels de formulário nos overlays */ body.light-theme label, body.light-theme .lbl, body.light-theme .label { color: var(--t2); } /* ── 18. INPUTS / FORMULÁRIOS ─────────────────────────────── .fi (form input), .si (search), textarea, select Já usam var(--card/border/text) → automático Mas garantir placeholder e focus visíveis ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ body.light-theme input::placeholder, body.light-theme textarea::placeholder { color: var(--t3); } body.light-theme input:focus, body.light-theme select:focus, body.light-theme textarea:focus { border-color: var(--purple) !important; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(124,92,252,.1) !important; } body.light-theme .fi:focus, body.light-theme .si:focus { border-color: var(--purple) !important; } /* ── 19. TOASTS ────────────────────────────────────────────── ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ body.light-theme .toast { background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text); box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg); } /* ── 20. COMPARTILHADO / EMPRESA ──────────────────────────── ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ body.light-theme .cfcard { background: var(--card); box-shadow: var(--shadow); } body.light-theme .npill { background: var(--card); border-color: var(--border); box-shadow: var(--shadow); } body.light-theme .npill span { color: var(--t2); } /* ── 21. REGISTRO POR CHAT ─────────────────────────────────── Chat area, input de mensagem ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ body.light-theme #chat-screen { background: var(--bg); } body.light-theme .chat-messages-area { background: var(--bg); } body.light-theme .chta { background: var(--card); border-color: var(--border); } /* ── 22. MISC ──────────────────────────────────────────────── Separadores, scrollbars, icons genéricos ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ /* Divisores entre seções */ body.light-theme hr, body.light-theme [style*="height:1px"] { background: var(--border) !important; } /* Pills de filtro de período */ body.light-theme .sa2 { background: var(--card); border-color: var(--border); color: var(--t2); } /* Badges de percentual */ body.light-theme .cc-sum-dot { filter: brightness(0.8) saturate(1.2); } /* Glow da navbar FAB mantido */ body.light-theme .pnav-fab { box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(124,92,252,.4); } /* Onboarding floating cards */ body.light-theme .ob-fcard-2 { background: var(--card2); border-color: var(--border); } /* Micro overlay backdrop */ body.light-theme .micro-ov { background: rgba(0,0,0,.35); } /* Skeleton loaders */ body.light-theme [class*="skeleton"], body.light-theme [class*="skel"] { background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--card2) 25%, var(--card3) 50%, var(--card2) 75%) !important; } /* ── 23. AJUSTE FINO DE ÍCONES INLINE ──────────────────────── Ícones SVG inline com stroke="#fff" fixo (onde o contexto indica que deve ser escuro no light) ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ /* Qualquer SVG dentro de row/item de lista (sem fundo colorido) */ body.light-theme .mais-row svg:not(.mais-row-ic svg):not(.mais-profile-chevron svg) { stroke: var(--t3) !important; } /* Row ic (tem fundo colorido) — mantém ícone como está */ body.light-theme .mais-row-ic svg { stroke: unset !important; } /* Ícones de chevron nos overlays */ body.light-theme .sa-chev, body.light-theme .chev-ic { color: var(--t3); stroke: var(--t3); } /* ── FIM ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ /* ── MAIS v2 — Header premium ────────────────────────────── */ .mais2-header{ flex-shrink:0; position:relative; background:linear-gradient(160deg,rgba(124,92,252,.18) 0%,rgba(124,92,252,.06) 60%,transparent 100%); border-bottom:1px solid rgba(124,92,252,.12); padding:calc(var(--safe-top,0px)+18px) 20px 20px; } .mais2-header-bg{ position:absolute;inset:0; background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 10% 50%,rgba(124,92,252,.15) 0%,transparent 70%); pointer-events:none; } .mais2-header-content{ position:relative;z-index:1; display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px; } .mais2-av-wrap{position:relative;flex-shrink:0;} .mais2-av{ width:64px;height:64px;border-radius:50%; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7C5CFC,#a78bfa); display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center; font-size:26px;font-weight:800;color:#fff; border:3px solid rgba(124,92,252,.4); overflow:hidden; box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(124,92,252,.35); } .mais2-av-edit{ position:absolute;bottom:-2px;right:-2px; width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%; background:#7C5CFC;border:2px solid var(--bg); color:#fff;cursor:pointer; display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center; -webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent; } .mais2-header-info{flex:1;min-width:0;} .mais2-saudacao{ font-size:22px;font-weight:800;color:var(--text); letter-spacing:-.4px;margin-bottom:4px; } .mais2-header-sub{ font-size:13px;color:var(--t2);font-weight:400; } /* Light mode overrides */ body.light-theme .mais2-header{ background:linear-gradient(160deg,rgba(124,92,252,.1) 0%,rgba(124,92,252,.04) 60%,transparent 100%); border-bottom-color:rgba(124,92,252,.1); } /* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */ /* MODO DE VISUALIZAÇÃO — Mobile / Desktop / Auto */ /* Auto (sem classe) = comportamento responsivo original */ /* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */ /* ── MOBILE FORÇADO: frame de 480px centralizado sempre ── */ body.layout-mobile .screen, body.layout-mobile .screen.active{ max-width:480px !important; margin:0 auto !important; left:50% !important; transform:translateX(-50%) !important; } body.layout-mobile .screen.active{transform:translateX(-50%) !important;} body.layout-mobile{display:flex !important;justify-content:center !important;} body.layout-mobile .bnav, body.layout-mobile .toast, body.layout-mobile .ov, body.layout-mobile #niv-ov, body.layout-mobile #sim-ov{max-width:480px !important;left:50% !important;transform:translateX(-50%) !important;} body.layout-mobile .toast.show{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0) !important;} /* ── DESKTOP FORÇADO: frame largo, melhor uso horizontal ── */ body.layout-desktop{display:flex !important;justify-content:center !important;background:#07080d;} body.layout-desktop.light-theme{background:#E8EAF2;} body.layout-desktop .screen, body.layout-desktop .screen.active{ max-width:min(95vw,1080px) !important; width:min(95vw,1080px) !important; margin:0 auto !important; left:50% !important; transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(8px) !important; box-shadow:0 0 80px rgba(124,92,252,.07) !important; } body.layout-desktop .screen.active{transform:translateX(-50%) !important;} /* Navbar inferior larga e centralizada (acompanha o frame) */ body.layout-desktop .prem-nav{ max-width:min(95vw,1080px) !important; left:50% !important; right:auto !important; transform:translateX(-50%) !important; border-radius:20px 20px 0 0; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 72px 1fr 1fr !important; } /* Toast e overlays acompanham largura confortável */ body.layout-desktop .toast, body.layout-desktop .bnav{max-width:min(95vw,1080px) !important;left:50% !important;transform:translateX(-50%) !important;} body.layout-desktop .toast.show{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0) !important;} body.layout-desktop .ov, body.layout-desktop #niv-ov, body.layout-desktop #sim-ov{max-width:600px !important;left:50% !important;transform:translateX(-50%) !important;} /* Conteúdo das páginas: usa o espaço horizontal com colunas */ body.layout-desktop .page{padding-left:max(24px,env(safe-area-inset-left));padding-right:max(24px,env(safe-area-inset-right));} /* Dashboard / home: cards em grid mais largo no desktop */ @media (min-width:760px){ body.layout-desktop .dg-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr) !important;} /* Listas e seções ganham largura confortável centralizadas */ body.layout-desktop .hgr, body.layout-desktop .scard, body.layout-desktop .prem-section{max-width:100%;} } /* Overlays fullscreen do Mais (dashboard geral, config, orçamento, metas) centralizados largos */ body.layout-desktop #mais-dash-ov, body.layout-desktop #mais-config-ov, body.layout-desktop #mais-orc-ov, body.layout-desktop #mais-metas-ov, body.layout-desktop #mais-perfil-ov, body.layout-desktop #mais-meta-form-ov, body.layout-desktop #mais-inv-ov, body.layout-desktop #mais-ajuda-ov, body.layout-desktop #cat-picker-ov, body.layout-desktop #cc-ov, body.layout-desktop #conta-ov, body.layout-desktop #catcreate-ov{ max-width:min(95vw,1080px) !important;left:50% !important;transform:translateX(-50%) !important; } /* ── ONBOARDING ───────────────────────────────────────────── */ #onboard-screen{background:#0f0f14;} /* Profile type — controle de visibilidade de elementos */ body[data-ptype="personal"] .env-pill[data-env="business"], body[data-ptype="personal"] [data-hide-biz]{display:none!important} body[data-ptype="business"] .env-pill[data-env="personal"], body[data-ptype="business"] [data-hide-pers]{display:none!important} /* Cartões do ambiente Empresa: ocultos no modo pessoal */ body[data-ptype="personal"] .cc-ftab[onclick*="empresa"], body[data-ptype="personal"] #ccf-empresa{display:none!important} body[data-ptype="personal"] #conta-filt-empresa{display:none!important} /* Esconder todo o switcher de ambiente quando só tem personal */ body[data-ptype="personal"] .env-pill[data-env="business"]{display:none!important} /* Esconder aba empresa nos cartões */ body[data-ptype="personal"] #ccf-empresa{display:none!important} /* Esconder opção empresa no env bar quando personal */ body[data-ptype="personal"] .env-bar .env-pill[data-env="business"]{display:none!important} /* Filtro de empresa nos cartões: ocultar label */ body[data-ptype="personal"] .mc-env-empresa{display:none!important} /* Opção de tipo "Empresa" no msg-create e add-ov */ body[data-ptype="personal"] #mc-env-empresa{display:none!important} /* Página empresa inteira */ body[data-ptype="personal"] #page-empresa{display:none!important} /* Labels e badges EMPRESA em contas */ body[data-ptype="personal"] #conta-sum-empresa, body[data-ptype="personal"] #conta-sum-empresa-qt{display:none!important} /* Botão tipo-empresa no formulário */ body[data-ptype="personal"] #conta-tipo-empresa{display:none!important} /* Filtro empresa nas mensagens rápidas */ body[data-ptype="personal"] #mpf-empresa{display:none!important} /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ ORGANIZZA — POLIMENTO VISUAL GLOBAL v7 Melhorias: espaçamento · hierarquia · microinterações · tipografia · scroll · animações · consistência REGRA: zero alteração de lógica ou funcionalidade ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */ /* ── 1. GLOBAL SCROLL BEHAVIOR ────────────────────── */ html { scroll-behavior: smooth; } .page, .screen, [class*="-list"], [class*="-scroll"], [class*="-body"], .chmsg, #cclist, #txlist, #mplist, #mlist, #rellist, #contlist, #goallist { -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; scrollbar-width: none; scroll-behavior: smooth; } .page::-webkit-scrollbar, .chmsg::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; } /* Overscroll containment para modais e overlays */ [style*="position:fixed"][style*="overflow-y:auto"], [style*="position:fixed"][style*="overflow-y: auto"], [style*="max-height:90vh"], [style*="max-height: 90vh"], [style*="max-height:80vh"], [style*="max-height: 80vh"] { overscroll-behavior: contain; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; } /* ── 2. TYPOGRAPHY REFINEMENTS ────────────────────── */ /* Melhorar legibilidade base */ body { -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale; text-rendering: optimizeLegibility; } /* Hierarquia de títulos mais consistente */ .section-title, [class*="-title"]:not(button):not(input) { letter-spacing: -.2px; } /* Labels uppercase mais legíveis */ [style*="letter-spacing:.5px"], [style*="letter-spacing:.6px"], [style*="letter-spacing: .5px"] { letter-spacing: .4px !important; } /* ── 3. SCREEN TRANSITIONS ────────────────────────── */ /* Levemente mais rápido para mobile — 0.28s → 0.22s */ .screen { transition: opacity .22s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1), transform .22s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1); will-change: opacity, transform; } .screen.active { transform: translateY(0) !important; } /* Page animation mais responsiva */ .page.active { animation: fadeUp .2s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1) both; } /* ── 4. NAVIGATION BAR POLISH ─────────────────────── */ /* Active state mais suave no nav */ .nvi.active .nvi-svg { transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.05); filter: drop-shadow(0 0 6px rgba(124,92,252,.5)); } .nvi:active { transform: scale(.88); } /* Botão de adicionar (nadd) — pulso mais sutil */ .nadd { box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(124,92,252,.35), 0 0 0 5px rgba(124,92,252,.07); transition: transform .15s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1), box-shadow .15s ease; } .nadd:active { transform: scale(.88); box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(124,92,252,.25); } /* ── 5. CARD POLISH ───────────────────────────────── */ /* Cards com transição de elevação ao toque */ .prem-card, .cc-summary-card, .insight-card, [class*="-card"]:not(button):not(.cfcard) { transition: transform .15s ease, box-shadow .15s ease; } /* Hover sutil em desktop */ @media (hover: hover) { .prem-card:hover, .cc-card-face:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 8px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.35); } } /* ── 6. BUTTON MICROINTERACTIONS ─────────────────── */ /* Todos os botões com active state consistente */ button:active:not(.nadd):not(.nvi):not(.btn-g):not([class*="cc-act"]) { opacity: .85; transform: scale(.97); } /* Btn primário mais premium */ .btn-g { letter-spacing: .1px; transition: transform .15s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1), opacity .15s ease, box-shadow .15s ease; } .btn-g:active { transform: scale(.97) !important; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(124,92,252,.2) !important; } /* ── 7. CHIP / FILTER POLISH ──────────────────────── */ /* Chips de filtro com transição mais suave */ .tx-fchip, .cc-ftab, [class*="-chip"], [class*="-tab"]:not(.nvi) { transition: all .18s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1) !important; } .tx-fchip:active, [class*="-chip"]:active { transform: scale(.93); } /* ── 8. CHAT AREA POLISH ──────────────────────────── */ /* Input do chat com borda mais suave em focus */ .chta { transition: border-color .2s ease, box-shadow .2s ease; } .chta:focus { border-color: var(--green); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(124,92,252,.12); } /* Mensagens do chat — espaçamento melhorado */ .chmsg > * + * { margin-top: 2px; } /* Balloon de confirmação (cfcard) — borda menos agressiva */ .cfcard { border-color: rgba(124,92,252,.45) !important; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(124,92,252,.08); } /* ── 9. MODAL POLISH ──────────────────────────────── */ /* Overlays com backdrop mais premium */ [style*="backdrop-filter:blur"] { -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(14px) !important; backdrop-filter: blur(14px) !important; } /* Modais com animação de entrada mais suave */ @keyframes sheetSlideUp { from { transform: translateY(100%); opacity: 0; } to { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; } } /* ── 10. CARD ACTIONS SPACING ─────────────────────── */ /* Botões de ação do cartão — gap melhorado */ .cc-act-btn { gap: 5px !important; font-size: 10.5px !important; transition: background .15s ease, color .15s ease !important; } .cc-act-btn:active { background: rgba(124,92,252,.1) !important; color: #a78bfa !important; } /* ── 11. FORM INPUTS POLISH ───────────────────────── */ /* Inputs com focus state consistente */ input:focus, textarea:focus, select:focus { outline: none; } input[style*="border"]:focus, textarea[style*="border"]:focus { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(124,92,252,.1); } /* ── 12. TRANSACTION LIST ITEMS ───────────────────── */ /* Hover em itens de transação */ @media (hover: hover) { [class*="tx-row"]:hover, [class*="-txrow"]:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,.025); } } /* ── 13. PROGRESS BARS ────────────────────────────── */ /* Barras de progresso com animação de entrada */ [class*="-bar-fill"], [style*="transition:width"] { transition: width .8s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1) !important; } /* ── 14. ICON CONSISTENCY ─────────────────────────── */ /* SVGs em botões não selecionáveis */ button svg, .nvi svg, .cc-act-btn svg { pointer-events: none; flex-shrink: 0; } /* ── 15. SCROLL PADDING ───────────────────────────── */ /* Respiro extra no final de listas scrolláveis */ .page { padding-bottom: 96px !important; } /* ── 16. FOCUS VISIBLE (acessibilidade) ───────────── */ /* Remove outline feio mas mantém para teclado */ *:focus { outline: none; } *:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(124,92,252,.6); outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 4px; } /* ── 17. SELECTION COLOR ──────────────────────────── */ ::selection { background: rgba(124,92,252,.3); color: #fff; } ::-moz-selection { background: rgba(124,92,252,.3); color: #fff; } /* ── 18. SMOOTH HOVER STATES (desktop) ───────────── */ @media (hover: hover) { .cc-card-menu-btn:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,.12); color: #fff; } .nvi:hover:not(.active) .nvi-svg { color: var(--t2); } .nvi:hover:not(.active) span { color: var(--t2); } } /* ── 19. LIGHT THEME CONSISTENCY ─────────────────── */ /* Garantir que transitions funcionem no light theme */ body.light-theme .screen { transition: opacity .22s ease, transform .22s ease; } body.light-theme .page.active { animation: fadeUp .2s ease both; } /* ── 20. NÚMERO GRANDES — KERNING ─────────────────── */ /* Valores monetários grandes ficam mais legíveis */ [style*="font-size:28px"][style*="font-weight:800"], [style*="font-size:32px"][style*="font-weight:900"], [style*="font-size:24px"][style*="font-weight:800"] { font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; letter-spacing: -.5px; } /* ── 21. EMPTY STATE POLISH ───────────────────────── */ [class*="empty"], [id*="empty"] { opacity: .7; font-style: italic; } /* ── 22. ANIMATED DOTS / LOADING ─────────────────── */ /* Remover flash em carregamento */ .screen { backface-visibility: hidden; } /* ── 23. SWIPE FEEDBACK (iOS) ─────────────────────── */ @supports (-webkit-touch-callout: none) { .page { -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; } button { -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; } input, textarea { -webkit-appearance: none; } } /* ── 24. CARD CONTENT BREATHING ──────────────────── */ /* Cards com conteúdo interno — melhorar respiro */ .cc-summary-card { padding: 20px 18px !important; } .cc-sum-grid { gap: 12px !important; } .cc-sum-item { padding: 13px 12px !important; } /* ── 25. ACTION BUTTONS ROW ───────────────────────── */ /* Botões de confirmação em modais — gap consistente */ [style*="display:flex"][style*="gap:10px"] > button { transition: transform .15s ease, opacity .15s ease !important; } [style*="display:flex"][style*="gap:10px"] > button:active { transform: scale(.96) !important; opacity: .9 !important; } /* ── ANTI-ZOOM iOS Safari ────────────────────────────────────────── iOS Safari faz zoom automático em qualquer input com font-size < 16px. Forçar font-size mínimo de 16px em TODOS os campos evita isso. A escala visual é preservada via transform quando necessário. ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ input, textarea, select { font-size: 16px !important; /* Garante que o font-size do sistema não interfira */ -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%; } /* Exceção: inputs onde o font-size grande ficaria estranho visualmente (ex: chips de busca compactos) mantemos 16px mas ajustamos padding */ input[style*="font-size:12"], input[style*="font-size:13"], input[style*="font-size:14"], input[style*="font-size:14.5"], input[style*="font-size:11"] { font-size: 16px !important; } textarea[style*="font-size:14"], textarea[style*="font-size:14.5"], textarea[style*="font-size:13"] { font-size: 16px !important; } /* Select fields */ select[style*="font-size:12"], select[style*="font-size:13"], select[style*="font-size:14"] { font-size: 16px !important; } /* Inputs de valor monetário grandes — manter tamanho visual */ input[style*="font-size:24"], input[style*="font-size:22"], input[style*="font-size:28"] { font-size: max(16px, 1.5rem) !important; } /* Viewport: garantir que user-scalable não está bloqueando indevidamente (já definido no meta tag, mas reforçar com CSS) */ @supports (-webkit-touch-callout: none) { /* iOS only */ input, textarea, select { font-size: 16px !important; } }
